scripts.build:release: set BUILD_MODE=production&& next build && npx cap sync android && npx cap build android --release
scripts.build:debug: set BUILD_MODE=development&& next build && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:ios:release: set BUILD_MODE=production&& next build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap build ios --release
scripts.build:ios:debug: set BUILD_MODE=development&& next build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap build ios --debug
scripts.build:android: npm run build:mobile && npx cap open android
scripts.build:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios && npx cap open ios
scripts.cap:build: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:build:ios: npm run build && npx cap sync ios
